earlyVoting.notes: Early voting available at designated locations

votingRules.phonesAtPollsDetail: Phones are permitted at New Mexico polling places.
additionalRules: Voters without ID may vote by affidavit

primaryParticipation.ruleExplanationEn: New Mexico has a closed primary (NMSA §1-8-16). Only voters registered with a political party may vote in that party's primary. Independent and unaffiliated voters are not permitted to vote in partisan primary elections.
primaryParticipation.ruleExplanationEs: Nuevo México tiene una primaria cerrada (NMSA §1-8-16). Solo los votantes registrados en un partido político pueden votar en la primaria de ese partido. Los votantes independientes y sin afiliación no pueden votar en primarias partidistas.
